title: just bored
content:
!-/gallery /pbox_images/photo-20050206-03 5617-0.jpg!

there's really no enough for human. when i had lots of works to do, i whine. now all works are done, i whine too. i guess i'm a human afterall. ;

p.s. this has absolutely nothing to do with the satellite dish. as mentioned, i'm bored.
